list.name: line
list.label: Line
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "iiot",
  tag: "line",
  predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry"
)

list.name: asset
list.label: Asset
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "iiot",
  tag: "asset",
  predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.line =~ /${line}/
)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "iiot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tag == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /${line}/ and r.asset =~ /${asset}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "iiot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tag == "speed_rpm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /${line}/ and r.asset =~ /${asset}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "iiot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tag == "reject_rate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /${line}/ and r.asset =~ /${asset}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "iiot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.tag == "produced_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line =~ /${line}/ and r.asset =~ /${asset}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")
